applicant_info.nature_of_business: General contracting for commercial and institutional construction, including healthcare facilities, educational buildings, and corporate offices.

additional_remarks.remark: Includes listed endorsements such as Amendment of Aggregate Limits of Insurance - Per Project, Designated Construction Project(s) General Aggregate Limit, Waiver of Transfer of Rights of Recovery Against Others to Us, and Alternate Employer Endorsement.
Additional insured status is extended to Woodbridge Realty Management Inc. as required by written contract. Coverage is primary and noncontributory.
Primary and Non-Contributory wording option per policy endorsement.

LOC-001: Corporate Headquarters - 300 Liberty Avenue, Suite 1200, Pittsburgh, PA 15222 (Occupancy: Office). LOC-002: Main Equipment Yard & Warehouse - 4500 Butler Street, Pittsburgh, PA 15201 (Occupancy: Warehouse). LOC-003: Fabrication Shop - 4720 Butler Street, Pittsburgh, PA 15201 (Occupancy: Manufacturing). LOC-004: South Hills Branch Office - 300 Village Run Road, Wexford, PA 15090 (Occupancy: Office).
Evidence of Workers Compensation coverage is required from all subcontractors prior to commencing work on the project.

The insured's principal operations consist of general contracting for commercial and institutional construction, including healthcare facilities, educational buildings, and corporate offices throughout Western Pennsylvania. Entity type: Corporation.
